creator: jason@unixguy.fidalgo.net
text:
User can panic kernel if softupdates are enabled and the user has an inode quota.

Fix: 

unknown, I'm sure someone will know.
How-To-Repeat:  	enable softupdates on a file system, give a user a inode quota under the number of inodes they have in use.  As user simply dd if=/dev/zero of=test bs=1024 count=10
